ListItem.Para: Left and center pitot probes are inspected before each departure.
Left and center pitot probe heater systems operate normally.
Left and center pitot air data modules operate normally.
Static air data modules operate normally.
AIR DATA/ATT instrument source switches operate normally.
Approach minimums do not require its use.

Note.Para: The left, center and right pitot and static ADMs are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Inspect the left and center pitot probes before each departure (AMM DDG 34-12-01).

ListItem.Para: Visually examine the left and center pitot probe external installations. Confirm there is no damage or unwanted material in the pitot probe opening.

OperationNote.Para: The NO LAND 3 advisory message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Right and center pitot probes are inspected before each departure.
Right and center pitot probe heater systems operate normally.
Right and center pitot air data modules operate normally.
Static air data modules operate normally.
AIR DATA/ATT instrument source switches operate normally.
Approach minimums do not require its use.

Note.Para: The left, center and right pitot and static ADMs are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Inspect the right and center pitot probes before each departure (AMM DDG 34-12-01).

ListItem.Para: Visually examine the right and center pitot probe external installations. Confirm there is no damage or unwanted material in the pitot probe opening.

OperationNote.Para: The NO LAND 3 advisory message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Left and right pitot probes are inspected before each departure.
Left and right pitot probe heater systems operate normally.
Left and right pitot air data modules operate normally.
Static air data modules operate normally.
AIR DATA/ATT instrument source switches operate normally.
Approach minimums do not require its use.

Note.Para: ISFD airspeed will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 34-24-01-02.
The left, center and right pitot and static ADMs are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Inspect the left and right pitot probes before each departure (AMM DDG 34-12-01).

ListItem.Para: Visually examine the left and right pitot probe external installations. Confirm there is no damage or unwanted material in the pitot probe opening.

OperationNote.Para: The NO LAND 3 advisory message will be displayed.
